calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-09-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Petitioners, Claudia roxana Figueroa and Edgar Santos Floress present for the minor in pro per and with Spanish Interpreter Anna Santa Maria.
Parties were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Edgar Eliseo Santos Figureroa.
Decree signed in open court.
